_comment: Timeline moment markers for the July 2 AFTERNOON phase (day-expansion slice 2). Times are phase battle-clock seconds (t=0 = 15:30 LMT, startTime 55800; sunset 19:29 = 14340). Every marker cites the anchor or editorial decision that places it (docs/reconstruction/angle-editorial-decisions.md; docs/reconstruction/audit/anchor-chain-proposal.md §2.3). The `battle` field gates this file to its own phase (a moments file may never render against another phase's clock).

moments.label: Longstreet's guns open
moments.detail: The First Corps artillery opens on the Union left — ~15:45 by Alexander's arithmetic (36 guns in action), 16:20 by Jacobs's clock reading; the two-pole spread is kept, not reconciled.

moments.label: Hood steps off
moments.detail: The en-echelon assault begins on the right — ~16:30 (envelope 16:15–17:00): the 16:00 signal dispatch excludes an earlier step-off; Law's own 'near 5 o'clock' is the late pole.
moments.citation: CA-J2A-3 as revised by ED-53 (the 16:00 signal dispatch via law-bl-1884; alexander-1907 arithmetic)

moments.label: Devil's Den falls
moments.detail: The three 10-pdr Parrotts of Smith's 4th NY change hands once, to an intermixed force — Robertson's Texans and Benning's Georgians, the 44th/48th Alabama up the gorge; no exclusive credit is encodable.

moments.label: Kershaw strikes the stony hill
moments.detail: Wave 2 of the Wheatfield record: Kershaw and Semmes against Tilton and Sweitzer — the V Corps withdrawal is ordered, on a reconnoitered outflanking, never a rout.

moments.label: Caldwell counterattacks
moments.detail: Wave 3: four II Corps brigades into the Wheatfield — Cross and Zook fall at its opening; Brooke reaches the Rose ravine crest.

moments.label: Barksdale breaks the Peach Orchard
moments.detail: The Mississippi brigade smashes the salient's apex ~18:15 and drives to Plum Run; Graham is wounded and captured; Barksdale falls mortally wounded before Willard's counterattack.
moments.citation: CA-J2A-9 (Alexander's interval arithmetic; Kershaw's drums pin; the j2-03 poised drawn state)

moments.label: The Plum Run crisis
moments.detail: Wilcox reaches the ravine and the 1st Minnesota charges; Willard stops Barksdale's axis; Wright touches the Emmitsburg-road gun line — never the crest; Johnson's assault strikes Greene's works a few minutes before 7.

moments.label: The counter-line charges
moments.detail: Wave 5: McCandless's Reserves and Nevin's brigade charge to the stone wall as Wofford's sweep reaches the foot of Little Round Top.
moments.citation: ED-57 wave 5 (or-27-1-crawford/-mccandless/-nevin; the Wofford tablet names the object)

moments.label: Sunset
moments.detail: 19:29 local mean time — Wofford's brigade 'fell back at sunset': the afternoon ladder's only astronomically pinned end clock. The fight shifts east to Culp's Hill and East Cemetery Hill (the evening phase).
